subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Akbar! Thy call hath reached the Most Exalted Horizon; thy lamentation and thy plaintive cry in separation from the Divine Lote-Tree hath been heard [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر ندایت بافق اعلی رسید ناله و نوحه ات را در فراق سدره منتهی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @wisdom [hikmat], @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
